old_javadoc:
/** * Tests whether the registry contains the given object pair. *

* Used by the reflection methods to avoid infinite loops. * Objects might be swapped therefore a check is needed if the object pair * is registered in the given or swapped order. *

* * @param lhs {@code this} object to lookup in registry * @param rhs the other object to lookup on registry * @return boolean {@code true} if the registry contains the given object. * @since 3.0 */
new_javadoc:
/** * Tests whether the registry contains the given object pair. *

* Used by the reflection methods to avoid infinite loops. * Objects might be swapped therefore a check is needed if the object pair * is registered in the given or swapped order. *

* * @param lhs {@code this} object to lookup in registry * @param rhs the other object to lookup on registry * @return boolean {@code true} if the registry contains the given object. */
commit_message: CompareToBuilder lacks cycle guard on Object[] recursion. (#1669)
